candidate_evidence.hypothesis_tested: fold-local intraday price memory density rank over close and range occupancy, directional sparse lanes, density gradients, revisit risk, and escape acceptance
candidate_evidence.next_boundary: candidate robustness audit found all nine folds profitable under baseline tick execution but thin weakest-fold cost buffer, partial survival under a 0.01 adverse cost diagnostic, and losing monthly MT5 tick periods; next work should design a true C0037 R0002 robustness conditioner rather than selected, economics-pass, runtime, ONNX, promotion, or live claim
candidate_evidence.reason_candidate_evidence: target-range activity, positive proxy, passed schedule replay parity, positive MT5 tick total net PnL, and nine profitable rolling-window tick folds

supporting_lessons.summary: intraday price memory density rank produced 7.477586 entries per active day, positive total fold-isolated tick net PnL, nine profitable folds, and zero losing folds
tick execution improved total net PnL by 9.29 versus closed-bar logic, with 5 tick-better folds, 4 tick-worse folds, and minimum exit-reason match rate 0.797571
candidate quality remains unselected because cost and slippage stress, monthly drawdown/streak hardening, native materialization, and ONNX portability evidence are not complete

R0001 candidate evidence is useful but requires hardening: aggregate extra cost buffer is 0.016977 account currency units per entry, weakest positive fold rw_001 has 0.004532 per entry to zero, and 4/9 folds remain profitable after a 0.01 adverse cost diagnostic

hypothesis_variant.summary: fold-local intraday price memory density rank over local close/range occupancy, directional sparse lanes, density gradients, revisit risk, and escape acceptance
hypothesis_variant.variant_boundary: first C0037 variant over price memory density; not a retry or threshold/window/SLTP/session/activity/spread/capital nudge of C0036, C0025, C0015, C0035, C0034, C0033, C0032, C0031, C0030, C0029, or C0028

notes: MT5 validation remains required even if proxy KPI is weak.

pre_open_decision.adjacent_tuning_rejection_reason: Changes the major hypothesis from range impulse memory, range overlap topology, liquidity vacuum, cycle phase, effort absorption, seasonal residual, tail-risk skew, entropy, VWAP, fractal pivot, and swing maturity to local price memory density and sparse-lane escape; it is not a threshold, score, stop, target, hold, session, activity, spread, capital, or retry nudge.
pre_open_decision.true_variant_summary: Tests closed-bar local price memory density and directional sparse-lane escape as a new C0037 campaign surface with mandatory schedule-replay MT5 pairing.

notes: Proxy output is reference evidence and cannot stop MT5 validation.
